name: kaola-workflow
description: 6-phase Kaola-Workflow for Claude Code and Codex — Research, Ideation, Plan, Execute, Review, Finalize. Multi-model orchestration with resumable phase artifacts.

scripts.test: npm run test:kaola-workflow:claude && npm run test:kaola-workflow:codex && npm run test:kaola-workflow:gitlab && npm run test:kaola-workflow:gitea
scripts.test:kaola-workflow:claude: node scripts/validate-script-sync.js && node scripts/test-validate-script-sync.js && node scripts/validate-vendored-agents.js && bash -n install.sh uninstall.sh && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8'))" && node scripts/test-agent-model-resolver.js && node scripts/test-install-model-rendering.js && node scripts/test-install-upgrade-rewrite.js && node scripts/test-install-manifest-single-source.js && node scripts/test-validation-runner.js && node scripts/test-install-adaptive-config.js && node scripts/test-next-action.js && node scripts/test-commit-node.js && node scripts/test-barrier-base-integrity.js && node scripts/test-issue-probe-memo.js && node scripts/test-claim-hardening.js && node scripts/test-adaptive-handoff.js && node scripts/test-adaptive-node.js && node scripts/test-plan-run.js && node scripts/test-replan.js && node scripts/test-bundle-state.js && node scripts/test-bundle-claim.js && node scripts/test-bundle-finalize.js && node scripts/test-sink-merge.js && node scripts/test-parallel.js --self-test && node scripts/test-edition-sync.js && node scripts/test-release-surface-drift.js && node scripts/test-release.js && node scripts/test-gap-sweep.js && node scripts/test-ledger-compare.js && node scripts/test-validation-allowband.js && node scripts/test-route-reachability.js && node scripts/test-agent-profile-parity.js && node scripts/validate-workflow-contracts.js && node scripts/test-fast-audit.js && node scripts/test-bash-block-guards.js && node scripts/test-fast-advance.js && node scripts/test-full-advance.js && node scripts/test-phase4-advance.js && node scripts/test-run-chains.js && node scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js && node scripts/test-active-folders-field-parity.js && node scripts/generate-routing-surfaces.js --check && node scripts/test-generate-routing-surfaces.js
scripts.test:kaola-workflow:codex: node scripts/validate-script-sync.js && node scripts/validate-kaola-workflow-contracts.js && node plugins/kaola-workflow/scripts/simulate-kaola-workflow-walkthrough.js && node scripts/test-active-folders-field-parity.js && node scripts/generate-routing-surfaces.js --check
scripts.test:kaola-workflow:gitlab: node scripts/validate-vendored-agents.js && node scripts/edition-sync.js --check && node plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/validate-kaola-workflow-gitlab-contracts.js && node plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/simulate-gitlab-workflow-walkthrough.js && node plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/simulate-gitlab-codex-workflow-walkthrough.js && node scripts/test-active-folders-field-parity.js && node scripts/generate-routing-surfaces.js --check
scripts.test:kaola-workflow:gitea: node scripts/validate-vendored-agents.js && node scripts/edition-sync.js --check && node plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/validate-kaola-workflow-gitea-contracts.js && node plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/simulate-gitea-workflow-walkthrough.js && node plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/simulate-gitea-codex-workflow-walkthrough.js && node scripts/test-active-folders-field-parity.js && node scripts/generate-routing-surfaces.js --check
